services.systemctl_cat:
# /home/obj/.config/systemd/user/vllm-embedding.service
[Unit]
Description=vLLM Qwen3-Embedding-8B (AEON v0.24 GB10 image, raw backend port 18012, behind llm-guard-proxy listeners 18009/18002/18005, reliability-first, 40k native max, 64 seq, post-start swap enforcement)
After=network.target
StartLimitIntervalSec=600
StartLimitBurst=3

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=DOCKER_HOST=unix:///run/user/1001/docker.sock
Environment=HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1
# Embedding is the reliability-critical service. Ideal would be oom_score_adj=0
# but rootless docker (rootlesskit pid 3907540 adj=200) caps the child floor
# at 200 — obj user cannot lower a process's oom_score_adj without sudo. The
# --oom-score-adj 0 flag below is kept as documentation of intent; docker
# silently accepts it but the value remains 200 in HostConfig. Protection
# relies on temporary workloads being launched with --oom-score-adj 1000
# (giving an 800-point gap), so the kernel kills them first under pressure.
# To fully reach adj=0, run `sudo choom -p <rootlesskit_pid> -n 0` then
# `systemctl --user restart vllm-embedding`.
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=30
TimeoutStartSec=600
TimeoutStopSec=60

ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/docker rm -f vllm-embedding
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker run --rm --name vllm-embedding \
  --gpus all --ipc host --dns 8.8.8.8 --dns 1.1.1.1 \
  -p 100.105.4.92:18012:8000 \
  -v /home/obj/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
  -e HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 \
  --memory 24g \
  --memory-swap 24g \
  --memory-swappiness 0 \
  --oom-score-adj 0 \
  --entrypoint python3 \
  ghcr.io/aeon-7/aeon-vllm-ultimate:2026-07-01-v0.24.0 \
  /usr/local/bin/vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B \
    --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 \
    --served-model-name qwen3-embedding-8b Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B \
    --convert embed \
    --max-model-len 40960 \
    --max-num-batched-tokens 8192 \
    --max-num-seqs 64 \
    --kv-cache-memory-bytes 5820M \
    --enforce-eager
# Rootless Docker can accept --memory-swap while leaving memory.swap.max=max.
# Enforce the generated docker scope directly and verify the 64+24+24=112GiB
# vLLM budget leaves ~9.6GiB headroom on the 121.6GiB GB10 host.
ExecStartPost=/home/obj/.local/bin/gb10_enforce_docker_cgroup_limits.sh vllm-embedding 24
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker stop vllm-embedding
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target

services.systemctl_cat:
# /home/obj/.config/systemd/user/vllm-aeon-27b-dflash.service
[Unit]
Description=vLLM AEON-7 Qwen3.6-27B DFlash n=10 (v0.24.0, FP8 KV, port 18010, 262144 ctx, util=0.49 cap, kv-mem=15360M≈1.03x, seq=64, guard active=8, post-start swap enforcement)
Requires=vllm-embedding.service
After=network.target vllm-embedding.service
# Direct AEON text endpoint moved behind llm-guard-proxy; wrapper owns stable 18009.
Conflicts=vllm-aeon-27b.service vllm-aeon-27b-dflash-v2.service vllm-aeon-27b-dflash-v3.service vllm-aeon-27b-nvfp4kv.service vllm-aeon-27b-nvfp4kv-test.service vllm-aeon-27b-nvfp4kv-lowmem.service vllm-aeon-27b-nvfp4kv-plus10g.service
StartLimitIntervalSec=600
StartLimitBurst=3

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=DOCKER_HOST=unix:///run/user/1001/docker.sock
Environment=HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1
OOMScoreAdjust=500
# Recover from real vLLM/container crashes such as EngineDeadError exits.
# Manual `systemctl --user stop` remains a clean stop and is not restarted.
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=30
TimeoutStartSec=1200
TimeoutStopSec=60

ExecStartPre=/bin/bash -c 'for i in $(seq 1 120); do curl -sf http://100.105.4.92:18012/v1/models >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; sleep 5; done; echo "embedding not ready after 10min"; exit 1'
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/docker rm -f vllm-aeon-27b-dflash-n12 vllm-aeon-27b-dflash vllm-aeon-27b
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker run --rm --name vllm-aeon-27b-dflash-n12 \
  --gpus all --ipc host --dns 8.8.8.8 --dns 1.1.1.1 \
  -p 100.105.4.92:18010:8000 \
  -v /home/obj/.cache/huggingface/hub/models--AEON-7--Qwen3.6-27B-AEON-Ultimate-Uncensored-Multimodal-NVFP4-MTP-XS:/models/aeon-cache:ro \
  -v /home/obj/.cache/huggingface/hub/models--z-lab--Qwen3.6-27B-DFlash:/models/dflash-cache:ro \
  -v /home/obj/scripts/aeon_hang_guard.py:/opt/hang_guard/aeon_hang_guard.py:ro \
  -v /home/obj/scripts/aeon_vllm_wrapper.py:/opt/hang_guard/aeon_vllm_wrapper.py:ro \
  -e HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 \
  -e PYTHONPATH=/opt/hang_guard \
  -e AEON_DEFAULT_THINKING_TOKEN_BUDGET=32768 \
  -e AEON_THINKING_BUDGET_GUARD=0 \
  --memory 64g \
  --memory-swap 64g \
  --memory-swappiness 0 \
  --oom-score-adj 500 \
  --entrypoint python3 \
  ghcr.io/aeon-7/aeon-vllm-ultimate:2026-07-01-v0.24.0 \
  /opt/hang_guard/aeon_vllm_wrapper.py serve \
    /models/aeon-cache/snapshots/6394b93fa092dcbfbf09e952f56f30337509d17c \
    --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 \
    --served-model-name "aeon-ultimate" "qwen3.6-27b-decensor-by-aeon" \
    --quantization modelopt \
    --kv-cache-dtype fp8_e4m3 \
    --attention-backend TRITON_ATTN \
    --mamba-cache-dtype float32 \
    --max-model-len 262144 \
    --max-num-seqs 64 \
    --max-num-batched-tokens 32768 \
    --enable-prefix-caching \
    --gpu-memory-utilization 0.49 \
    --kv-cache-memory-bytes 15360M \
    --speculative-config '{"method":"dflash","model":"/models/dflash-cache/snapshots/0919688658996800f86b895034249700e9481106","num_speculative_tokens":10,"attention_backend":"TRITON_ATTN"}' \
    --enable-chunked-prefill \
    --no-scheduler-reserve-full-isl \
    --reasoning-parser qwen3 \
    --enable-auto-tool-choice \
    --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder \
    --default-chat-template-kwargs '{"enable_thinking": false}' \
    --override-generation-config '{"temperature": 0.6, "top_p": 0.95, "top_k": 20}' \
    --trust-remote-code
# Rootless Docker can accept --memory-swap while leaving memory.swap.max=max.
# Enforce the generated docker scope directly and verify the 64+24+24=112GiB
# vLLM budget leaves ~9.6GiB headroom on the 121.6GiB GB10 host.
ExecStartPost=/home/obj/.local/bin/gb10_enforce_docker_cgroup_limits.sh vllm-aeon-27b-dflash-n12 64
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker stop vllm-aeon-27b-dflash-n12
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target

services.systemctl_cat:
# /home/obj/.config/systemd/user/vllm-qwen3-reranker-8b.service
[Unit]
Description=vLLM Qwen3-Reranker-8B (AEON v0.24 GB10 image, BF16, 40k ctx, pooling reranker, util=0.22, raw backend port 18013, behind llm-guard-proxy listeners 18009/18003/18005, 64 seq, post-start swap enforcement)
Requires=vllm-aeon-27b-dflash.service
BindsTo=vllm-aeon-27b-dflash.service
After=network.target vllm-aeon-27b-dflash.service
PartOf=vllm-aeon-27b-dflash.service
Conflicts=vllm-qwen35-hauhau.service
StartLimitIntervalSec=600
StartLimitBurst=3

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=DOCKER_HOST=unix:///run/user/1001/docker.sock
Environment=HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1
OOMScoreAdjust=800
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=30
TimeoutStartSec=1320
TimeoutStopSec=60

ExecStartPre=%h/.local/bin/aeon_chat_ready.py --url http://100.105.4.92:18010/v1/chat/completions --models-url http://100.105.4.92:18010/v1/models --deadline-seconds 1260 --timeout-seconds 6 --long-timeout-seconds 1200 --interval-seconds 5
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/docker rm -f vllm-qwen3-reranker-8b
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker run --rm --name vllm-qwen3-reranker-8b \
  --gpus all --ipc host --dns 8.8.8.8 --dns 1.1.1.1 \
  -p 100.105.4.92:18013:8000 \
  -v /home/obj/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
  -e HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 \
  --memory 24g \
  --memory-swap 24g \
  --memory-swappiness 0 \
  --oom-score-adj 800 \
  --entrypoint python3 \
  ghcr.io/aeon-7/aeon-vllm-ultimate:2026-07-01-v0.24.0 \
  /usr/local/bin/vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-8B \
    --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 \
    --served-model-name qwen3-reranker-8b Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-8B \
    --runner pooling \
    --dtype bfloat16 \
    --max-model-len 40960 \
    --max-num-batched-tokens 40960 \
    --max-num-seqs 64 \
    --gpu-memory-utilization 0.22 \
    --kv-cache-memory-bytes 5820M \
    --enforce-eager \
    --chat-template /vllm-workspace/examples/pooling/score/template/qwen3_reranker.jinja \
    --hf-overrides '{"architectures":["Qwen3ForSequenceClassification"],"classifier_from_token":["no","yes"],"is_original_qwen3_reranker":true}' \
    --trust-remote-code
# Rootless Docker can accept --memory-swap while leaving memory.swap.max=max.
# Enforce the generated docker scope directly and verify the 64+24+24=112GiB
# vLLM budget leaves ~9.6GiB headroom on the 121.6GiB GB10 host.
ExecStartPost=/home/obj/.local/bin/gb10_enforce_docker_cgroup_limits.sh vllm-qwen3-reranker-8b 24
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker stop vllm-qwen3-reranker-8b
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
